title: Cloudflare Notification Webhook Payload
description: The standard payload structure for Cloudflare notification webhooks. When an alert fires, Cloudflare sends an HTTP POST with this JSON payload to configured webhook endpoints.

name.description: The name of the notification policy that triggered this webhook.

text.description: Human-readable description of the alert with interpolated values specific to the event.

data.description: Alert-specific data whose structure varies depending on the alert_type. Contains detailed information about the event that triggered the notification.

ts.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the notification was generated.

account_id.description: The Cloudflare account identifier associated with the notification. May not be present in all notifications.

policy_id.description: The UUID of the notification policy that triggered the webhook.

policy_name.description: The name of the notification policy.

alert_type.description: The unique identifier for the alert category (e.g., advanced_ddos_attack_l4_alert, health_check_status_notification).

alert_correlation_id.description: UUID for grouping related alerts that are part of the same incident.

alert_event.description: The event state indicating whether the alert is starting or ending.
